title: QoLite++ 2
description: An optimized Fabric modpack for 1.21.5 that enhances vanilla gameplay with subtle quality-of-life tweaks and performance boosts.
body:
# **QOLite++ 2 – Optimization & Visual Polish**
QOLite++ 2 is a carefully balanced modpack that focuses on performance, visual upgrades, and quality of life improvements—without sacrificing the vanilla gameplay experience.

# **Smart Performance Optimization**
Boost your FPS and reduce lag with proven performance mods: Sodium, Lithium, Entity Culling, FerriteCore and ImmediatelyFast drastically improve performance by optimizing world rendering, entity processing, and memory usage. These mods ensure a smooth experience, even on lower-end systems.

# **Complete Visual Control**
Take full control of your Minecraft visuals:
- Iris Shaders brings full shader support to Fabric (including OptiFine shaders).
- Continuity enables connected textures.
- Zoomify allows custom zoom levels.


# **Quality of Life Enhancements**
Play more comfortably and efficiently with these features:
- AppleSkin displays saturation and hunger details directly in the HUD.
- Mod Menu, Cloth Config API, and Reese’s Sodium Options make mod configuration quick and easy.
- Jade (formerly Hwyla/Waila) shows block and entity info on hover.
- InventoryTweak and Controlling enhance inventory and control management.
- MiniHUD and BetterF3 upgrade your HUD and information display.

# **Faster Launch & Stability**
Mods like Fabric API and Fabric Language Kotlin improve startup time and ensure compatibility across a wide range of mods.

# **Improved Navigation**
With Xaero’s Minimap/WorldMap, you'll get real-time world navigation with waypoints and detailed maps.
